overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing an FBI agent walking through a rainy small town in autumn. The character meets a partner at an intersection, continues down a wet street past townspeople, and approaches a wooden gate near the Elderwood Palace Lodge.

scene_state.functional_zone: small town intersection near wooden lodge

events.description: FBI partner agent comes into view walking toward the camera
passing the partner agent in the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from the lodge toward the intersection

notable_agents.action: FBI partner in suit walking toward camera then passing by on the right

entered.detail: rustic log cabin style building with covered porch and stone chimney
wooden porch with roof extending over the entrance
wooden utility pole with traffic signals and overhead wires
two-story red brick building with storefronts and windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens behind an FBI agent walking away from a rustic wooden lodge in a small mountain town. The wet asphalt reflects the overcast sky. An FBI partner approaches from the opposite direction and passes by in the crosswalk near a traffic light.

scene_state.functional_zone: small town main street with lodge signage

events.description: turning left at the intersection onto the main street
passing the Elderwood Palace Lodge sign and stone wall

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and walking down the wet main street

entered.detail: large wooden sign with carved text mounted on stone wall
low stone wall with wooden fence posts above
distant hillside covered with orange and red autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The agent turns left at the intersection onto a quieter street. The Elderwood Palace Lodge sign becomes visible on a stone wall to the left. The street is lined with parked cars and leads toward distant hills covered in autumn colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with group of townspeople

events.description: slowing as approaching three townspeople standing in the street
passing the group and continuing down the street

agents.ego_description: approaching and carefully walking past three townspeople standing in conversation

notable_agents.action: three townspeople in red flannel shirts and caps standing in a group conversing

entered.detail: single-story yellow building with dark roof and garage door
log cabin style wall with stone foundation base

segments.scene_description: Walking down the residential street, the agent approaches three townspeople in red flannel shirts standing in the road. The Elderwood Palace Lodge's log wall runs along the left side while a yellow building sits on the right. The agent passes the stationary group and continues toward a wooden gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley path with wooden gate and market stall

events.description: approaching the large wooden gate structure at the end of the street
turning right to follow the path along the wooden fence

agents.ego_description: walking to the wooden gate then turning right along the fence line toward a market stall

entered.detail: tall wooden plank gate with crossbeam and diagonal bracing
tall wooden privacy fence running along the dirt path
outdoor market stall with purple umbrella canopy and display table
inverted triangle yield sign on metal pole

segments.scene_description: The agent reaches a large wooden gate at the end of the street, then turns right onto a dirt path running alongside a tall wooden fence. A purple canopy market stall sits to the left of the path. The area is more enclosed and residential, with houses visible behind the fences.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wet town intersection into a secluded residential path bordering a rustic lodge. It begins behind an FBI agent walking away from a wooden lodge on reflective asphalt, passing a partner at a traffic light intersection. As the agent turns left, the scene shifts toward a quieter street where the Elderwood Palace Lodge sign appears on a stone wall against a backdrop of autumn-colored hills. The camera then follows the agent past a group of townspeople in red flannel shirts, moving between a log wall and a yellow building before approaching a large wooden gate. Finally, the view turns right onto a dirt path lined by a tall wooden fence and a purple canopy market stall, transitioning into a more enclosed residential area.
